# Area Wide Paving
> Asphalt paving contractor, Sulphur Springs, TX

Area Wide Paving is Northeast Texas's most trusted asphalt paving contractor, serving 12 counties from our Sulphur Springs headquarters since 2003. Owner Paul Pogue personally supervises every project.

## Services
- Asphalt driveway installation and replacement
- Commercial parking lot paving
- Asphalt overlays and resurfacing
- Sealcoating and crack filling
- Line striping and pavement marking
- Asphalt repair and patching
- Private roads and agricultural paving

## Service Area
Sulphur Springs, TX and surrounding areas including Tyler, Longview, Greenville, Paris, Mount Pleasant, Texarkana, and Marshall across Hopkins, Smith, Gregg, Hunt, Lamar, Titus, Bowie, Harrison, Wood, Camp, and surrounding counties.

## Contact
- Phone: (903) 885-6388
- Address: 723 County Road 2301, Sulphur Springs, TX 75482
- Website: https://areawidepaving.net

## About
Area Wide Paving has served Northeast Texas for over 20 years with owner Paul Pogue on every jobsite. We're fully licensed and insured, maintaining a 4.9-star Google rating with 47 reviews. Our expertise in East Texas clay soil conditions and climate ensures long-lasting asphalt installations.

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How much does asphalt paving cost in Northeast Texas?
A: Residential driveways typically cost $3-$7 per square foot, while commercial parking lots range from $2.50-$5 per square foot, depending on thickness, base preparation, and site conditions.

Q: How long does asphalt last in East Texas?
A: Properly installed asphalt lasts 15-20 years in Northeast Texas with regular maintenance including sealcoating every 3-5 years.

Q: What's the best time to sealcoat in Texas?
A: April through October provides the best weather window, with temperatures between 50-90°F and minimal rain for proper curing.

Q: Why choose asphalt over concrete in East Texas?
A: East Texas clay soil expands and contracts with moisture. Asphalt flexes with soil movement while concrete cracks, making asphalt the better long-term choice.

Q: What areas does Area Wide Paving serve?
A: We serve a 12-county area from our Sulphur Springs base, including Hopkins, Smith, Gregg, Hunt, Lamar, Titus, Bowie, Harrison, Wood, and Camp counties.
